name: outsystems-actions
description: Chrome extension that monitors OutSystems deployments

scripts.copy-assets: cp src/manifest.json src/popup.html dist/ && cp -r src/icons dist/ && cp -r src/locales dist/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run typecheck && npm run compile && npm run copy-assets
scripts.package: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../dist.zip . && echo "Created dist.zip"
